name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Tucson, AZ: Visit Primo Personal Loans at 3782 S 12th Ave b for fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans is located at 3782 S 12th Ave b in Tucson, Arizona, in a standalone storefront. The location is open seven days a week: Monday through Friday from 7 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for working residents and those with weekend schedules.

This Tucson branch specializes in payday loans and title loans for residents needing fast cash. Call +1 520-502-6220 to speak with a loan specialist about rates, repayment terms, and eligibility. The staff can walk you through the application process and answer questions about the loans available at this location.

If you need quick funds in Tucson, AZ, Primo Personal Loans offers an alternative to traditional bank loans. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and an active bank account to speed up the process. This storefront is open weekends, which is helpful if you need fast cash outside standard business hours.
pros: Applying does not affect your FICO score — uses a non-traditional consumer reporting agency instead
Low loan floor of $100 makes it accessible for very small emergency cash needs
Physical branch locations (Columbia SC, Memphis) for in-person service
SSL and TSL dual-layer security on the online application
Dedicated accessibility phone line and on-site toolbar for assistive technology users
Responsible disclosure recommending credit counseling for borrowers in hardship
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website — cost is a black box until you apply
Maximum loan of $5,000 is very low — unsuitable for anything beyond minor short-term gaps
Online funding may take up to two business days — not truly same-day
Loan availability limited by state — not all applicants or states qualify
Explicitly short-term only — not appropriate for debt consolidation or larger planned expenses
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$5,000 quickly for a short-term gap who cannot wait for a bank
Consumers who want to check eligibility without a hard FICO inquiry
Columbia, SC or Memphis residents who prefer an in-person lending experience
Borrowers with non-traditional credit histories who may not qualify at mainstream lenders
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans suits borrowers in Columbia, SC or Memphis who need $100–$5,000 fast and want to check eligibility without a FICO hit — particularly those with non-traditional credit histories who value a physical branch option. The critical caveat is that no rates or APR are published on the website, so actual loan cost is unknown until you apply; borrowers should treat any offer as a baseline to compare against credit unions or CDFI alternatives before accepting.
services: Non-FICO soft credit check via non-traditional consumer reporting agency
Identity verification per USA PATRIOT ACT
Accessibility support via phone and on-site toolbar
meta_description: Primo Personal Loans at 3782 S 12th Ave b, Tucson, AZ. Fast loans, open weekends.
